items.title: Samsung’s Odyssey 27-inch QHD QD-OLED monitor just hit a new all-time low at $300 (40% off)
items.summary:
As part of a wider sale on Samsung monitors, Woot is offering the brand’s Odyssey (G50SF) 27-inch QHD QD-OLED gaming monitor for $299.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This is one of the newer entries in the brand’s Odyssey lineup, which debuted late last year with a $550 price tag. It has more recently been going for $500 at Amazon and Samsung, where it’s currently going for $430. Today’s deal at Woot, however, cuts a full $200 off its usual going rate, dropping it $50 below its previous all-time low and our earlier mention this year. That makes this the best price we’ve tracked so far, making an already well-priced QD-OLED gaming monitor an even better value today.

more…

items.title: Woot’s massive gaming sale is back: Up to 85% off peripherals, Switch/PS5 games, more from just $4 (Extra 20% off today only)
items.summary:
Hot on the heels of its Logitech sale event – which is still running with discounts of up to 70% – Woot has now kicked off an updated gaming sale featuring offers that can save you up to 85% on PS5 and Switch 2 games, peripherals, and so on. For today only, you can score an extra 20% off by using promo code GAMER20 at checkout. This sale event once again has a bunch of battlestation accessories on offer, ranging from controllers, headsets, keyboards, and more, with prices starting as low as $4. Even newer releases like the 8BitDo 64 Bluetooth gamepad are part of the sale this time around, which is great. Unlike the Logitech sale, all items in this one are brand new, making it a great time to jump in while these offers last.

Amazon is currently offering the advanced EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut Self-Propelled Touch Drive Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries and a rapid charger down at $582.04 shipped. Normally fetching $779 at full price, this package dropped to $650 at the top of April and held there for most of the month, with things now falling further for the best price we have tracked since Black Friday, when it fell to $580. The deal here gives you a 25% markdown for $197 savings, landing it at the third-lowest tracked price, just $32 above a one-time $550 low from June and July in 2025. You can also find this same advanced model with 2x 6.0Ah batteries and a rapid charger for $779 shipped, which is the best price we’ve seen since mid-December Christmas sales.

items.summary:
We have already detailed this morning’s Square Enix Switch game sale at Amazon and Best Buy – you’ll find all of those deals right here and down below. But Amazon has also launched a separate digital Switch game sale starting from $30 and with up to 40% in savings. You’ll find a host of first-party titles on sale here, ranging from Hyrule Warriors Age of Calamity and Kirby’s Return to Dream Land Deluxe to Nintendo Advance Wars 1+2: Re-Boot Camp alongside some third-party titles as well. Check it out right here and down below. 

Amazon Nintendo Switch game sale

As you can see below there are a host of digital games on sale right now at up to 40% off the list prices:

  • Hyrule Warriors Age of Calamity $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Kirby’s Return to Dream Land Deluxe $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Fire Emblem: Three Houses $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Bayonetta and Bayonetta 2 $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Bayonetta 3 $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Bayonetta 2 $30 (Reg. $50)
  • Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes Standard $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Metroid Dread $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Emio – The Smiling Man $30 (Reg. $50)
  • Nintendo Advance Wars 1+2: Re-Boot Camp $40 (Reg. $60)
  • LIVE A LIVE $30 (Reg. $50)

While this morning’s game deals roundup is where you will find deals on Mario and Zelda titles, this Amazon sale is serving up some notable discounts on titles we don’t often see marked down like Hyrule Warriors Age of Calamity, Fire Emblem: Three Houses, Nintendo Advance Wars 1+2: Re-Boot Camp, and more. 

Down below you’ll find some highlights from the aforementioned Square Enix sale and more – the rest await right here. 

  • Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade $30 (Reg. $40)
  • OCTOPATH TRAVELER 0 Switch 2 $40 (Reg. $50)

  • DRAGON QUEST VII Reimagined Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60)
  • Grand Theft Auto The Trilogy Definitive Edition $20 (Reg. $30)
  • DAVE THE DIVER Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $12 (Reg. $20)
  • Hades II – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $24 (Reg. $30)
  • Hello Kitty Island Adventure Switch 2 Edition $30 (Reg. $50)
  • MLB The Show 26 $45 (Reg. $60)
  • Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties Deluxe Edition $49 (Reg. $75)
  • Cronos: The New Dawn $42 (Reg. $60)
  • Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 $55 (Reg. $70)
  • Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $56 (Reg. $65)
  • Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild $44 (Reg. $60)

items.title: Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale drops Mars 3.0 folding e-bike with a FREE pannier bag to $1,199 low for first time in 2026, more
items.summary:
Heybike is currently celebrating its 5th Anniversary running through the month of May with up to $800 in e-bike savings, including free bundled gear. Alongside the continued low we’re seeing on the newest Helio F Smart Folding Classic e-bike, we’re seeing a big 2026 first with Heybike’s Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike with a FREE pannier bag ($79 value) at $1,199 shipped. Down from a $1,799 full price, which would cost you $1,878 in full with the bag, we’ve been seeing this newer ride discounted to $1,299 in 2026, with Black Friday having been the last time we spotted it down at its all-time lowest price. Now, that low is finally appearing in 2026 for the first time, giving you $600 off the e-bike’s tag and $679 in total savings for the best price and best bundle package we have tracked to date. You can head below to learn all about it and the other offers, or check out the full lineup of anniversary deals on the main sale page here.
